name: Minute Steaks Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, combine the egg white, water, and pepper. Set aside.
2. On a plate, mix together the cracker crumbs and grated Parmesan cheese.
3. Dip each steak into the egg mixture, then coat with the cracker/cheese mixture.
4. In a large skillet, melt the margarine over medium heat.
5. Brown the steaks on both sides in the skillet.
6. Add the pizza sauce and simmer for 3-5 minutes.
7. Garnish with the remaining cracker/cheese mixture.
8. Serve immediately. Serves 4.
Serve this with Honey Butter Corn and an Italian Salad. Then for dessert, have...
